creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Do you know what?

"what" is that at some point I am going to get pissed off enough to do the forensic work to find out exactly who you assholes are, and why you cause me extra work that I would rather not do.

That is "what".

Of course you have been marked as spammers.  Until the next bullshit email address you generate.  Which I expect momentarily.
